reviews.title: What They Say About Us
reviews.subtitle: Over 499 satisfied guests have shared their experience on Google.

items.name: Márk G.
items.text: Go here if you want to have some REAL burgers with Taste and Soul. Nice job guys, thanks for the opportunity. Greetings from Vác :)

items.name: Silvanian Farmvet
items.text: 10/10. Kituno, very good. Best burger in town!

items.name: Stacy McGraw
items.text: First time in Debrecen. Was wanting a burger. Came across this place and so glad we did. Burger was cooked to perfection and the fries were incredible.

items.name: Lior Megidish
items.text: Perfect place, the most delicious hamburger in Debrecen, excellent service, recommended!

items.name: Jens Holm
items.text: Another wonderful example of why American burger chains shouldn't take over the world. Great little burger place with authentic burgers, authentic flavour, and done the way it should be done. Very good service, with everyone speaking English.

items.name: Matthias L.
items.text: That's the place for burger. Top Service. Super delicious food.

items.name: Zoli Bertli
items.text: One of the best burger makers I have ever tried. At the same time authentic and special, every component is in its place. Worth to try by all means.

items.name: Mk Ten
items.text: I went there with a colleague, he said it's the best burger around and boy was he right! The waiting time is so long at rush hour, but totally worth the wait.

items.name: Nez
items.text: Along with its little brother 2.0, the best burgers in Debrecen.

items.name: Georg Wimmer
items.text: Best burger in Debrecen! The guys are giving great effort and it is definitely worth to go there!

items.name: Péter Erdős
items.text: Full place, good quality, good portions, good price. And on top of that, the staff is nice.

items.name: János Borbély
items.text: It's not overdone, the guy serving really cares about the guest's opinion. The hamburger is juicy and tasty. There's no feeling that weighs on the stomach afterwards. Only the good taste remains.

items.name: Ahmet Faruk Çobanbeyli
items.text: Best burger in all around Hungary!

items.name: Tamirlan Bakirov
items.text: One of the best burgers in Debrecen.

about.title: The Blazing Burger Story
about.subtitle: Passion, quality and commitment to the perfect burger.

story1.title: A Passion Born
story1.description: Blazing Burger was born from the vision of bringing a true American craft burger experience to Debrecen. Not a fast-food chain, but a local favorite where every burger is made with artisan care.

story2.title: Quality in Every Bite
story2.description: We believe quality isn't a luxury — it's a principle. Fresh local ingredients, hand-formed patties and carefully selected toppings. We never cut corners because our guests deserve the best.

story3.title: A Local Favorite
story3.description: Over 499 satisfied guests, a 4.9 rating — these aren't just numbers. They prove that Blazing Burger has become one of Debrecen's most beloved burger houses. Families, friends and burger enthusiasts all keep coming back.

craft.title: Artisan Quality
craft.description: Every patty is freshly made, hand-formed — not factory-made, but true craft.

local.title: Local Favorite
local.description: We're proud to be the home of Debrecen's burger enthusiasts.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Our love for food shows in every burger, every fry, every cup of coffee.

gallery.title: Moments at Blazing Burger
gallery.subtitle: Premium burgers, cozy atmosphere and unforgettable experiences.
